name: management_report
label: Management report regression deck
focus: Check the opening page is conclusion-led rather than directory-like.
Check the storyline from status to action remains readable in slide order.
Check the final page still closes with a concrete recommendation or next step.

name: project_solution
label: Project solution regression deck
focus: Check comparison, roadmap, and execution pages keep balanced density.
Check section transitions feel intentional rather than repetitive.
Check diagrams and supporting bullets remain readable after rendering.

name: training_deck
label: Training deck regression deck
focus: Check higher page counts do not accumulate obvious overflow risks.
Check repeated teaching-style slides still vary enough in title and rhythm.
Check dense explanatory pages remain presentation-readable.

name: industry_analysis
label: Industry analysis regression deck
focus: Check quantified claims and evidence notes remain legible.
Check analytical pages do not collapse into generic background content.
Check charts, matrices, and conclusion pages keep visual hierarchy.

name: monthly_business_review
label: Monthly business review regression deck
focus: Check KPI-style pages remain readable under denser business content.
Check summary and action pages stay distinct from status pages.
Check no slide appears visually broken before manual review.
